headline: Local models broke out alongside agentic SEO and from-scratch agent builds dominating the leading tools.
body: Local models led the rotation and registered as a breakout, anchored by Google's Gemma 4 demo running 10 subagents locally above 170 tokens per second through an orchestrator pattern [6]. Agentic SEO surged in parallel, with Claude Code wired to Google Search Console to find and deploy ranking content, moving one site from 2 to 200+ daily clicks [7]. Hermes introduced a Blank Slate mode for building lean agents from scratch [3], and NotebookLM was reframed as a full autonomous agent with a cloud computer for code and documents [5]. A cluster of resilience techniques (data backup, immutability, disaster recovery, ransomware protection) entered as new entrants, signaling a shift toward operational hardening.

cited_items.title: This NEW Hermes Update Builds Agents From Scratch
This NEW NotebookLM Update Changes Everything
Gemma Playground: Parallel Agents in Action
Claude Code AI SEO: How to Rank #1 with Claude Code
